# GitHub Repository Secrets Template
# ================================
# Go to: Your repo → Settings → Secrets and variables → Actions → New repository secret
# Copy each Name EXACTLY as shown (case-sensitive, no spaces).
# Paste your actual value in the Secret field. Do NOT add quotes.
#
# Name                     Secret (paste your value)
# ----------------------   --------------------------------------------------
OPENAI_API_KEY             sk-your-actual-api-key-here

OPENAI_API_BASE            https://your-api-base-url-here/v1

OPENAI_MODEL_NAME          your-model-name-here
